bugs.title: HR_ADMIN + fayaz fallback login failing — Password@123 in original contract is wrong (actual is Welcome@123)
repro: Contract later edited mid-run: correct password is Welcome@123

bugs.title: Auth rate limit (5/min) shared bucket trips under parallel worker login storm despite W_INDEX*12s stagger (36s for W3)
repro: 10 workers stagger logins at W_INDEX*12s intervals (0,12,24,36,48,60,72,84,96,108)
Multiple POSTs land in same 60s window -> 429 returned
bugs.evidence: network log: 3x 429 responses in short span

bugs.title: Account lockout (423 Locked) triggered on hradmin@nulogic.io after mixed failed attempts
repro: 3 failed Password@123 attempts + subsequent Welcome@123 attempt -> 423 Locked
Shard cannot proceed until 15min lockout expires

notes: Shard aborted per WORKER_CONTRACT rule 7 (login fails 2x -> FAILED). Root-cause cascade: (1) initial contract specified Password@123; actual password is Welcome@123 (contract was edited mid-run to correct). (2) W3 stagger (36s) + concurrent worker auth storm tripped the shared 5/min rate limit (429). (3) Multiple 401 attempts with wrong password triggered account lockout (423 Locked on hradmin@nulogic.io). Regression probes NOT executed: /recruitment, /recruitment/jobs, /recruitment/jobs/new (F-09 404 check), /recruitment/candidates (F-08 403 cluster), /recruitment/pipeline, /recruitment/agencies, /recruitment/interviews, /onboarding. API regression checks (candidates / letters templates / employees) also skipped. Fix forward: (a) broadcast credential update to all workers before launch; (b) widen auth rate limit or increase per-worker stagger >20s; (c) clear hradmin@nulogic.io lockout in Redis (AccountLockoutService key) before rerunning W3.
